chapter_title.en: Chapter on What Has Been Reported Regarding a Thief Who Overpowers a Woman for Her Private Part and Kills Her Child

text: 5374 - وَ رَوَى جَمِيلُ بْنُ دَرَّاجٍ عَنْ زُرَارَةَ قَالَ: قُلْتُ لِأَبِي جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ اَلرَّجُلُ يَغْصِبُ اَلْمَرْأَةَ نَفْسَهَا قَالَ "يُقْتَلُ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.5374 - Jamil ibn Darraj narrated from Zurara, who said:
I asked Abu Jafar Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Baqir (as) about a man who forces himself upon a woman.
Imam (as) said: "He is to be killed."
